summary: DHH announces his packed October 2005 conference schedule, which includes JAOO, Web 2.0, RubyConf, and EuroOSCON. He notes this means nearly three weeks of traveling. He also promotes EuroOSCON by mentioning a Rails tutorial by Jarkko and shares a 25% discount code for attendees.
key_points: DHH had a packed October 2005 conference circuit spanning multiple major tech events
Rails was gaining enough traction to warrant tutorials at mainstream conferences like EuroOSCON
The post reflects the early community-building era of Ruby on Rails evangelism
money_quotes: October is going to be one heck of a conferencing month.
That's nearly three weeks of traveling. Eeks.
key_insight: A brief logistical post from the early Rails era showing DHH's heavy conference evangelism schedule as the framework was gaining mainstream developer attention.
